description: Course-maintained allowlist of known-good Provenance recorder extension hashes. The extension_hash_mismatch heuristic flags any bundle whose manifest.extension_hash is NOT in this list. Operational note: update this list each time a new recorder .vsix is published. The actual hash is the SHA-256 of the built .vsix file (64-char lowercase hex), as emitted by the recorder into bundle.manifest.extension_hash at seal time. PLACEHOLDER_EXTENSION_HASH must be replaced with the real hash before deployment.
